name: minimalism-ui
description: Transform UI into a Typora-like style, with the left side fixing the note status information and the right side focusing on the content of the note.

scripts.build: node scripts/generate-theme-assets.mjs && tsc -noEmit -skipLibCheck && node esbuild.config.mjs production
scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json

author: Lucas
